protocol_notes: Recommends dosing based on BPC-157 and TB-500 content (0.5mg-1mg each), resulting in GHK-Cu dose of ~2.5mg-5mg. Higher dose = more aggressive therapy and faster results. Recommends split dosing 2x/day for best effectiveness (e.g., 0.5mg morning + 0.5mg before bed). Most people prefer single pin before bed to synergize with sleep/repair. Has observed people taking 2-3mg x2/day for fastest recovery.
